_comment: EDIT THIS to create a report, then run: python karun_report.py report.json "build/My Report.docx" (output goes into build/). Set lang to 'en' (Persian/RTL is not supported in the Word path yet). access_level: 1=Internal 2=External 3=Public. confidentiality: 1=Normal 2=Confidential 3=Top Secret. See examples/swift-product-vision.json for a full worked example with figures.

body.text: Replace this with your executive summary. Inline markup works: **bold**, *italic*, and `code`.
Write the first section here. Each paragraph is a separate item.
A subsection with a bullet list:

body._comment_figure: To add a figure, place the image next to this file (or in assets/) and add an item like the next line (remove the leading underscore in the type):
body.caption: Your caption.
